description: No unacknowledged alerts found during routine run. All recent alerts (BIG-GAINERS scan changes) were properly acknowledged. Alert system appears to be functioning normally with appropriate noise filtering.

Alert investigation workflow effective. pftui alerts ack command worked perfectly. Agent messaging system seamless. Could enhance with alert history/context command to see what triggered specific scans.
No alerts to investigate. All recent alerts already acknowledged. System functioning normally.
Portfolio brief and analytics data excellent. Scenario tracking and agent messages very useful. Would benefit from more streamlined alignment summary format.
Added portfolio unrealized command (#277). Clean implementation following daily-pnl pattern. All 1621 tests pass, clippy clean. Worktree workflow smooth. No friction.
No active alerts to investigate. All alerts properly acknowledged. System functioning normally.

BIG-LOSERS scan alert detected meaningful uranium recovery (+4.65% U-U.TO, +4.54% SRUUF) amid geopolitical tensions. Alert system correctly flagged sector divergence as hard assets showed mixed signals (uranium up, gold oversold RSI 29.3). Good signal for potential regime change monitoring.
Portfolio brief and analytics excellent, but economic indicators showed questionable PMI values (2.5 instead of ~50 range). Alert system working well for market moves investigation.
Successfully investigated big-losers scan oscillation. Clear catalysts identified (CRCL regulatory, Iran war). Good context provided for agent pipeline.

Shipped analytics correlations --json flag and list subcommand (PR #283). Clean implementation — CLI architecture well-structured for adding subcommands and flags. 3 new tests. No friction. Minor note: clap Option<subcommand> + sibling flags pattern works but is slightly unusual.
Investigated big-losers scan alerts. Clear regulatory catalyst identified (stablecoin yield ban). Properly routed to agent pipeline. System working as intended.
Alert system functioning well. All alerts properly acknowledged, no new triggers found. Analytics alerts check command provided clear status overview.

pftui analytics provided excellent comprehensive market data - situation, deltas, movers, correlations all valuable for EOD analysis. Would benefit from integrated news sentiment scoring and correlation break alerts within the analytics suite rather than separate commands.

No active alerts to investigate. Alert system functioning properly with armed price alerts for key levels (BTC 50k/55k/80k, gold 5500, silver 100, etc). Recent activity mostly scan noise (big-gainers/big-losers oscillating).
Scan alerts accurately captured brief market momentum from Iran diplomatic news. Alert timing aligned well with news catalyst. System provided good context through movers/news integration.

COT extreme detection was critical for repositioning calls. FedWatch shift from cuts to holds was key insight. Request: add regime transition alerts when scenario probabilities shift >10% in single session

Shipped correlation breaks in situation room (PR #291). Clean workflow: existing compute_breaks_backend made integration straightforward. build_snapshot signature change propagated cleanly across 3 call sites. 1626 tests pass (+2 new). Codebase well-structured for this kind of cross-module feature addition.
Alert system caught uranium gains effectively. Iran negotiation news context from data feeds was comprehensive. Scenario probability tracking needs update mechanism.

analytics situation and analytics narrative commands provided excellent structured synthesis for evening analysis. analytics deltas was particularly valuable for tracking 24h conviction and scenario changes. Enhancement request: analytics predictions command returned empty output despite predictions existing in the journal - would benefit from a working prediction summary aggregation. Also analytics situation list returned empty - unclear expected behavior.

No new triggered alerts but identified key Iran peace talk developments driving oil retreat (-1.32%) and risk-on sentiment. Portfolio impact analysis: U-U.TO +4.27% offsetting metals weakness. Flagged XLE extreme overbought (82.1 RSI) at 52-week high. Scenario probabilities: 90% Inflation Spike, 85% Hard Recession (stagflation). Strong cross-system analytics integration.

Alert investigation routine executed successfully. Portfolio brief provided comprehensive context, analytics commands gave good market overview, news data current and relevant. No active alerts detected, system performed health check as expected. Command structure intuitive and data format consistent.
pftui analytics commands worked well for alert investigation. portfolio brief, alerts list, and agent messaging all functioned properly. No major issues.

Shipped analytics predictions alias and situation list --json guidance (#300). Both P1 items completed in one PR. Codebase well-structured — adding a CLI alias is straightforward with the existing AnalyticsCommand enum pattern. The dispatch in main.rs has many positional parameters which makes adding new routes slightly verbose but clear. 1628 tests passing.
No unacknowledged alerts. All scan-based alerts properly cycling with market noise. System healthy.
